use_cases: Submit verification codes in two-factor authentication flows
Trigger 2FA resend actions in login security workflows
Confirm identity verification steps in fintech applications
Enable disabled states during async verification loading
ai_summary: A flexible React button component with multiple variants and sizes designed for authentication interfaces, featuring loading states, icon support, and accessibility-focused interactions. Built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for enterprise-grade security applications requiring two-factor authentication flows.
